config_template.notes: Supports in-place via output_tensor=input (used widely after group_norm in VAE/UNet resnet blocks); preserves input sharding when memory_config matches input shard spec; silu can hang if input is not TILE layout

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large VAE/UNet conv feature map ([N,1,H*W,C] tiled, H*W >> 1024 tiles)
placement_observations.source: VAE decoder resnet block: hidden_states = ttnn.group_norm(..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); hidden_states = ttnn.silu(hidden_states, output_tensor=hidden_states)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: conv decoder activation when conv slicing is enabled (does not fit L1 full-slice)
placement_observations.source: if self.conv_out_slice_config != ttnn.Conv2dL1FullSliceConfig: hidden_states = ttnn.to_memory_config(hidden_states, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); hidden_states = ttnn.silu(hidden_states)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch, H, W, C] height-sharded feature map fitting in L1
placement_observations.source: unit test: input_tensor = ttnn.to_memory_config(input_tensor, memory_config=in_sharded_mem_config); output_tensor = ttnn.silu(input_tensor, memory_config=in_sharded_mem_config)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: UNet sample tensor reshaped to [1,1,N*H*W,C], block/height sharded
placement_observations.source: sample = ttnn.silu(sample, memory_config=ttnn.get_memory_config(sample)); sample = ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(sample, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, sample.dtype)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small [B, 1, D] / [1,1,B,D] time embedding (D ~ 1-6K, B small)
placement_observations.source: DiT transformer blocks: time_embed = ttnn.silu(time_embed, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); spatial_time = self.norm1_linear(time_embed)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small-batch decode activation [1, B, hidden] / [B, seq<=32, intermediate]
placement_observations.source: LLM MLP: gate_silu = ttnn.silu(gate_o, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); gated = ttnn.mul(gate_silu, up_o, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)
z = ttnn.silu(z, memory_config=mc_dram); out = ttnn.linear(z, self.pointwise_conv2_weight, memory_config=mc_dram)
